description: Maps each workflow step and subagent to a complexity tier and recommended model

low.description: Fast, cost-efficient — for validation, linting, simple lookups

medium.description: Balanced — for reviews, governance discovery, structured analysis

high.description: Maximum capability — for complex reasoning, architecture, planning

step-1.name: Requirements
step-1.rationale: Deep discovery, multi-phase questioning, NFR extraction

step-2.name: Architecture
step-2.rationale: WAF analysis, trade-off reasoning, cost estimation orchestration

step-3.name: Design
step-3.rationale: Diagram generation and ADR writing — structured output

step-4b.name: Bicep Plan
step-4b.rationale: AVM module selection, dependency analysis, governance mapping

step-4t.name: Terraform Plan
step-4t.rationale: AVM-TF module selection, dependency analysis, governance mapping

step-5b.name: Bicep Code
step-5b.rationale: Complex code generation with AVM, policy compliance, multi-module

step-5t.name: Terraform Code
step-5t.rationale: Complex code generation with AVM-TF, policy compliance, multi-module

step-6b.name: Bicep Deploy
step-6b.rationale: Deployment execution — structured CLI commands with error handling

step-6t.name: Terraform Deploy
step-6t.rationale: Deployment execution — structured CLI commands with error handling

step-7.name: As-Built
step-7.rationale: Documentation generation from deployed state — structured output

governance-discovery-subagent.rationale: REST API calls and policy classification

cost-estimate-subagent.rationale: Pricing API lookups and structured calculation

bicep-lint-subagent.rationale: CLI command execution and output parsing

bicep-whatif-subagent.rationale: CLI command execution and output summarization

terraform-lint-subagent.rationale: CLI command execution and output parsing

terraform-plan-subagent.rationale: CLI command execution and change summarization
